description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named basic test that runs on push to any tag and branch master, and on pull requests to branches master and feature-2.0. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to run multiple tox environments with different configurations. The job should check out the repository, set up a Docker service, and cache tox, pip, and pre-commit dependencies. Then, set up Python 3.10, install tox-travis, and run tox with the specified configuration.
